title: レース入着2～5着（レース入着）

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As a model racer, you could say it was an
adequate performance.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, everyone else's brave efforts this time were
nothing short of brilliant!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I feel so proud seeing the
sweat on their brow from all the hard work they
put in!
choice_data_list: You also did your best, Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I feel so proud seeing the
sweat on their brow from all the hard work they
put in!
choice_data_list: You also did your best, Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes, I tried my best. I really did try my best...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But even if everyone did their best, I was
supposed to place first!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: As class representative, it is my duty to cross the finish line before anyone else and then welcome everyone as they arrive!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Next race, I'll be welcoming all of my rivals from
the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm after the King of Speed and Most Exemplary awards!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I shall continue to aim for the most
exemplary victory! Let's go! BAKUSHIIIN!
